"'''Outlaw Battle Armor'''" is a roleplaying-game source article by [[Philip Tobin]]. It was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] and introduces a range of rare battle armors. [[Stalker Armor M1-10|One of the armors]] eventually made it into ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''.
